projects.name: GradeTrack Pro: GPA & CGPA Calculator with Admin Panel
details: Developed a full-stack academic performance management system for GPA and CGPA calculations.
Implemented JWT authentication and role-based access control.
Built student dashboards, GPA history tracking, and curriculum management features.
Integrated PDF generation and academic reporting functionalities.

projects.name: Event Management System
details: Developed a desktop application using a multi-layered architecture and database integration.
Implemented invoice generation using iTextPDF and OTP verification using Jakarta Mail and Twilio.
Added role-based access control, real-time chat functionality, analytics dashboards, and payment tracking.

projects.name: Interactive Weather Map
details: Developed a real-time weather visualization platform using REST APIs.
Integrated Open WeatherMap, Nominatim Geocoding, and Wikipedia APIs.
Implemented city search, weather forecasting, and interactive map visualization.
